array_types.name: chars_ptr_array
array_types.code:
type chars_ptr_array is array (Natural range <>) of
  aliased Interfaces.C.Strings.chars_ptr;

array_types.name: Fd_Pair
array_types.code:
type Fd_Pair is array (Pipe_Ends) of Interfaces.C.int
  with Convention => C;

array_types.name: pollfd_array
array_types.code: type pollfd_array is array (Positive range <>) of pollfd;

record_types.name: pollfd

variables.name: environ
variables.code:

  with Import, Convention => C, External_Name => "environ";

subprograms.name: dup2
subprograms.code:
function dup2
  (oldfd : Interfaces.C.int;
   newfd : Interfaces.C.int)
     return Interfaces.C.int

subprograms.name: execve

ioctl
kill
open
pipe2
subprograms.code:
function pipe2 (pipefd : out Fd_Pair; flags : Interfaces.C.int)
  return Interfaces.C.int
